report:
Bad Kitty team's vertical spinner, 8-6 in recorded Discovery-era fights.
Fandom confirms MadCatter was announced early among the 24 Pro League competitors.
Fan consensus on the official Group B poll thread: "MadCatter beats everyone except Tombstone".
The same thread expects "MadCatter and Tombstone have a rematch" deciding the group.
An Instagram teaser hypes "major shakeup" in Group B - MadCatter sits at the center of it.
This week's fight IS the Tombstone matchup fans called the group decider.
Fresh reddit intel says Tombstone arrives "in its old design" - if true, that favors MadCatter's newer build.
MadCatter also headlined the renewal press cycle (HyperShock vs. MadCatter promo fight).
Fan pick-lists frequently slot MadCatter as a group winner ("Manta - Madcatter - Copperhead...").
No damage reports found from the Episode 1 taping window.
note: cached demo report - written by Claude from the MCP-scraped sources listed (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY enables live generation)
